scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (addresses, parcels, shipments, transactions); the full Shippo surface (rates, tracking, refunds, customs items, batches, orders) is out of scope outside this connector's current declared surface. Shippo is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.
